australian_relation: ABC public media article with source-stated haunted claims attached to Fremantle Arts Centre in Western Australia.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC page names Fremantle Arts Centre and discusses haunted claims and paranormal experiences there; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Fremantle Arts Centre result.
evidence_summary: ABC News reported in 2022 that the imposing hallways and dark staircases of the Fremantle Arts Centre building had long sparked public curiosity, including claims it is haunted and stories of paranormal experiences. The article says the former asylum and women's home had sections known by staff to change temperature without explanation, while the director said she did not want to sensationalise the spirits it was rumoured to house.
publication_or_organisation: Fremantle Arts Centre director calls for stories to explore history of former lunatic asylum; ABC Radio Perth
title: spirits in Fremantle Arts Centre haunted claims
